legacy_original.goal: document work that must not be repeated and what may only be regressed, audited, or repaired

protected_work.evidence: P2-REAL-001 integration test proves real FFmpeg probe/demux/decode. KivoPacket.data carries real compressed payload.
protected_work.protection: Do not recreate FFmpeg skeleton; only regress, audit, or repair.

protected_work.evidence: Presenter boundary first frame test fixed: D3d11DeviceContext created before D3d11TextureUpload, skip gracefully if D3D11 unavailable.
protected_work.protection: Do not revert abort fix; only repair if regression found.

protected_work.evidence: SKIP_REGULAR_EXPRESSION added to CMake so D3D11-unavailable machines get CTest SKIP, not PASS.
protected_work.protection: Do not remove skip semantics; only repair if skip logic breaks.

protected_work.evidence: WASAPI writer implementation Pimpl struct with COM pointers.
protected_work.protection: Do not rewrite wasapi_internal.hpp; only repair if COM pipeline breaks.

protected_work.evidence: D3D11 device context and texture Pimpl structs.
protected_work.protection: Do not rewrite d3d11_internal.hpp; only repair if D3D11 API breaks.

protected_work.item: FfmpegFrameResult frame data / linesize / plane count
protected_work.evidence: FfmpegFrameResult struct with frame_data, linesize, plane_count fields for real AVFrame data extraction.
protected_work.protection: Do not remove frame data fields; only repair if frame extraction breaks.

legacy_original.allowed_repair_scope: Only regress, audit, or repair if a later repair card proves a defect. No new skeleton work.
legacy_original.reason: Protected work documented, allowed repair scope defined, forbidden actions listed.
